notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Royce Lewis. Brice Turang scores. Andrew Vaughn to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Royce Lewis.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Royce Lewis. Brice Turang scores. Andrew Vaughn to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Royce Lewis.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez grounds into a double play, third baseman Royce Lewis to second baseman Tristan Gray to first baseman Kody Clemens. Luis Rengifo out at 2nd. Gary Sánchez out at 1st.
